title: OpenEMS - Open Energy Management System
note: Documents the open-source energy management platform and its role in orchestrating renewable generation, storage, grids, loads, EV charging, and heat pumps.

title: OpenEMS GitHub Repository
note: Source repository supporting openness, activity, and technical readiness for OpenEMS.

title: OpenADR Alliance
note: Explains OpenADR as an open, secure, two-way standard for demand response and distributed energy resource coordination.

title: About OpenADR
note: Provides additional detail on OpenADR message standardization among utilities, ISOs, aggregators, and energy management systems.

title: Microgrids Could Enhance Grid Resilience
note: Supports the microgrid concept, including distributed energy resources, resilience, islanding, and community critical-service use cases.

title: Heat Pump Systems
note: Supports heat pumps as a practical building electrification pathway that can replace or reduce fossil-fuel heating demand.
